title: Judge Input Envelope
description: Canonical orchestrator-to-judge context envelope. Defines evaluation task, artifact mappings, fallback semantics, and run metadata.

evaluation_type.description: Evaluation mode for this judge run.

task.description: Natural-language evaluation objective that judges must follow.

supporting_artifacts.description: Secondary artifacts available to judges in order of priority.

source_of_truth.description: Ordered list of artifact IDs defining evidence priority. Judges use this to prioritize evidence across artifacts.

active.description: Whether this run is in fallback mode.

reason.description: Reason fallback mode is active; may be empty when inactive.

fallback_artifacts.description: Artifacts used when fallback mode is active. Entries may be IDs or full artifact descriptors.

path.description: Absolute or workdir-relative path to the artifact.

type.description: Artifact content type (for example: json, markdown, text, diff).

required.description: Whether artifact is mandatory for this run.
